name: @mdz-format/viewer-hosted
description: Cloudflare Worker that renders any MDZ archive at a URL via the @mdz-format/viewer web component. Public instance at view.mdz-format.org.
comment: `@mdz-format/viewer: *` works because the npm workspaces config in the repo root symlinks packages/* into each workspace's node_modules. Swap to a version pin once the viewer is published.
